name: Waveform Editor
author: ottocoster
description: Opens an audio clip in a sample-level waveform and pitch editor for spot-fixing pops, clicks, clipping, and tuning without leaving Ableton Live. Renders the clip to a temporary file, edits it in a modal canvas with Waveform, Pitch (TD-PSOLA), and Spectral tabs, then imports the result onto a new track; handles monophonic pitch material only.
